scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api-python && uv run python -m app.db.bootstrap
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api-python && uv run python -m app.db.bootstrap
scripts.smoke:python-worker-import: cd apps/api-python && uv run --extra dev python ../../scripts/python_worker_import_smoke.py
scripts.smoke:python-sample: cd apps/api-python && uv run --extra dev python ../../scripts/python_backend_sample_smoke.py
scripts.smoke:python-real-library: cd apps/api-python && REQUIRE_REAL_LIBRARY_SAMPLE_DIR=true uv run --extra dev python ../../scripts/python_backend_sample_smoke.py
